title: scoparia glandulifera
intro: Scoparia glandulifera, also known as Japanese tea or Japanese mint, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scoparia glandulifera include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and lower blood sugar levels. Scoparia glandulifera is typically prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it can also be taken as a capsule or tincture in herbal preparations.
